summary: Created MPI-170 — Docs reorg: drain gotchas.md (646 lines/138 entries) to ≤200 into subsystem/research homes + add docs/README.md index + enforce ≤200-line-per-doc rule. Full plan at docs/DOCS-REORG-PLAN.md (mapping by 3 parallel analysis agents, complete — execute against it). ~25 files: 6 new files, 3 splits (runpod-remote-engine/comfy/project-integrity all already >200), ~90 lines duplicate deletes, CLAUDE.md router repoint. Root cause: CLAUDE.md/MEMORY.md route agents INTO gotchas as the one learned-stuff bucket, nothing routes OUT — this adds the outbox. Guardrails: grep target before deleting a dup; research lab notebooks exempt from 200-line rule; preserve UNVERIFIED flags verbatim; explicit-pathspec commits on shared RunPod branch.
Picked up MPI-170 docs reorg — executing against docs/DOCS-REORG-PLAN.md. Moved todo->doing before touching files.

All in-scope reference docs <=200. MEMORY.md repointed docs/gotchas->docs/README map.
